title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BSNL

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BSNL
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BSNL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About BSNL:
BSNL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL!
